content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To     :   Memo to File:                                Date  :  April 20, 1976


From  :   FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION             71-76-356
          Kenneth Finney

Subject:  Re:  Government Code Section 84103


          At a staff meeting on Thursday, 4/15/76, it was agreed
that Section 84103 should not be interpreted to require the
filing of an amendment to a statement of organization
whenever any change in the information contained in the
statement occurs. In contrary, committees, other than
control committees (see opinion in the Matter of Senator
Petris, No. 75-039, I FPPC 20), should be advised that the
filing of an amendment is necessary only when there is a
significant change in the information contained in the
statement of organization. Moreover, a decision to
contribute to one additional candidate not listed on the
statement of organization is not a significant change.


KF:pvp

The image appears to be a nearly blank or extremely faded document. I can only make out what appears to be two small circular marks or holes near the top of the page, and possibly some very faint text that is too illegible to transcribe with confidence.

[illegible]
